race.comment: BOOZIE MISS (6) is another strong winning chance for the Gollan yard. Her three starts have all been in metro Maidens, with the 1L defeat at Eagle Farm on debut the best of them. Fitter again and will carry just 54kg with the claim. RUMBLE TOWN (3) has switched from a Victorian yard on a 50-day return. Maps well and has been saved for this. He's trialled at the Sunshine Coast and is right up to winning if presented on song. CHOCECLAIR (7) has been busting to win at the track, and there was nothing in it the latest as a $2.6 favourite. Keeps the handy 2kg claim and maps for the run of the race. SPOILT ROTTEN (14) led and just missed here two back and then folded up in stronger at Doomben. The speedy galloper is better placed and will skip over and give a sight.
